title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 31 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 31 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 31 2025
summary:
Main
Today, iron ore futures were in the doldrums, with DCE I2601 contract closing at 800 yuan, down 0.56% from the previous trading day. Mainstream spotcargoes at ports fell 0-5 yuan/mt compared to yesterday. In Shandong, transaction prices for PB fines were around 800 yuan/mt, down 0-5 yuan/mt from the previous day; in Hebei, transaction prices for PB fines were 805-810 yuan/mt, down 5 yuan/mt from the previous trading day.
